綜合球隊實力、盤口數據、天氣因素及 AI 歷史命中率表現，本場比賽看好 Barcelona 大勝，推薦主勝讓分盤 (-1.75) 及大分 (3.5)。

nba.title: Ball 的關鍵進攻保住 Hornets 在緊張的比賽中
nba.summary: LaMelo Ball made the go-ahead bucket with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, and Miles Bridges sealed the win with a block at the buzzer to propel the Hornets and oust the Heat in Tuesday night's play-in g
nba.title_zh: Ball 的關鍵進攻保住 Hornets 在緊張的比賽中
nba.title_en: Ball's clutch drive saves Hornets in frantic finish

nba.title: Spoelstra：Ball 應該因絆倒 Adebayo 被驅逐
nba.summary: Heat center Bam Adebayo suffered a lower back injury after a fall in the second quarter and was ruled out in the second half.
nba.title_zh: Spoelstra：Ball 應該因絆倒 Adebayo 被驅逐
nba.title_en: Spo: Ball should've been tossed for Adebayo trip

nba.title: Blazers 依靠 Avdija 的 41 分擊敗 Suns，鎖定第 7 種子
nba.summary: Deni Avdija scored 41 points to help the Blazers erase an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter for a 114-110 win over the Suns that  secured the No. 7 seed in the Western Conference playoffs.
nba.title_zh: Blazers 依靠 Avdija 的 41 分擊敗 Suns，鎖定第 7 種子
nba.title_en: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed

nba.title: Amazon 直播在 Heat 對 Hornets 的驚心動魄的比賽中途斷線
nba.summary: Amazon Prime Video's stream of the Miami-Charlotte play-in game went offline for nearly two minutes during the overtime period, causing fans to miss a Hornets possession.
nba.title_zh: Amazon 直播在 Heat 對 Hornets 的驚心動魄的比賽中途斷線
nba.title_en: Amazon feed cuts out late in Heat-Hornets thriller

nba.title: J. Cole 結束中國職業籃球隊的效力
nba.summary: Rap megastar J. Cole said Tuesday that his time playing professional basketball in China has come to an end after one game.
nba.title_zh: J. Cole 結束中國職業籃球隊的效力
nba.title_en: J. Cole ends stint with Chinese pro hoops team

nba.title: Curry 在必須贏的附加賽中受分鐘限制
nba.summary: Stephen Curry is one of three Golden State Warriors who will be on a minutes restriction in the team's play-in game against the Clippers in Los Angeles on Wednesday.
nba.title_zh: Curry 在必須贏的附加賽中受分鐘限制
nba.title_en: Curry on minutes restriction in must-win play-in

nba.title: Bronny 的 Nike 'B9' 標誌商標申請被拒
nba.summary: Nike's trademark filing for Lakers guard Bronny James' "B9" logo has been refused because of a "likelihood of confusion" with an already-registered mark.
nba.title_zh: Bronny 的 Nike 'B9' 標誌商標申請被拒
nba.title_en: Bronny's Nike 'B9' logo trademark filing denied

nba.title: Lakers 備戰 Rockets，Doncic 沒有新消息
nba.summary: After putting his team through its first practice in preparation for the playoffs, Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said Tuesday he doesn't have any more information about when Luka Doncic could ret
nba.title_zh: Lakers 備戰 Rockets，Doncic 沒有新消息
nba.title_en: No update on Doncic as Lakers prep for Rockets
